raw_response: {"failures": [{"mode_id": "1.2", "evidence": "The Supervisor Agent attempted to log in to the simple_note app but failed due to incorrect API usage."}, {"mode_id": "1.3", "evidence": "The Supervisor Agent did not recognize that the task was effectively complete after creating the note."}, {"mode_id": "2.2", "evidence": "The Supervisor Agent did not request clarification when the SimpleNote Agent indicated it needed to check available APIs."}, {"mode_id": "2.3", "evidence": "The Supervisor Agent deviated from the task by trying to create a new note instead of marking the existing one as done."}, {"mode_id": "2.4", "evidence": "The Supervisor Agent failed to detect that there were no notes related to the bucket list."}, {"mode_id": "2.5", "evidence": "The agents could not converge on a resolution regarding the bucket list notes."}, {"mode_id": "2.6", "evidence": "The Supervisor Agent did not share the information about the existing notes with the SimpleNote Agent."}, {"mode_id": "2.7", "evidence": "The Supervisor Agent ignored the suggestion from the SimpleNote Agent to use the search_notes API."}, {"mode_id": "3.1", "evidence": "The task was marked complete before all necessary information had been exchanged."}]}

predictions.evidence: The Supervisor Agent attempted to log in to the simple_note app but failed due to incorrect API usage.
The Supervisor Agent did not recognize that the task was effectively complete after creating the note.
The Supervisor Agent did not request clarification when the SimpleNote Agent indicated it needed to check available APIs.
The Supervisor Agent deviated from the task by trying to create a new note instead of marking the existing one as done.
The Supervisor Agent failed to detect that there were no notes related to the bucket list.
The agents could not converge on a resolution regarding the bucket list notes.
The Supervisor Agent did not share the information about the existing notes with the SimpleNote Agent.
The Supervisor Agent ignored the suggestion from the SimpleNote Agent to use the search_notes API.
The task was marked complete before all necessary information had been exchanged.

per_mode.name: 1.2 Inconsistency between reasoning and action
per_mode.evidence: The Supervisor Agent attempted to log in to the simple_note app but failed due to incorrect API usage.

per_mode.name: 1.3 Unaware of stopping conditions
per_mode.evidence: The Supervisor Agent did not recognize that the task was effectively complete after creating the note.

per_mode.name: 2.2 Fail to elicit clarification
per_mode.evidence: The Supervisor Agent did not request clarification when the SimpleNote Agent indicated it needed to check available APIs.

per_mode.name: 2.3 Derailment from task
per_mode.evidence: The Supervisor Agent deviated from the task by trying to create a new note instead of marking the existing one as done.

per_mode.name: 2.4 Undetected conversation ambiguities and contradictions
per_mode.evidence: The Supervisor Agent failed to detect that there were no notes related to the bucket list.

per_mode.name: 2.5 Disagreement induced inaction
per_mode.evidence: The agents could not converge on a resolution regarding the bucket list notes.

per_mode.name: 2.6 Withholding relevant information
per_mode.evidence: The Supervisor Agent did not share the information about the existing notes with the SimpleNote Agent.

per_mode.name: 2.7 Ignoring suggestions from agents
per_mode.evidence: The Supervisor Agent ignored the suggestion from the SimpleNote Agent to use the search_notes API.

per_mode.name: 3.1 Ill specified termination condition leading to premature termination
per_mode.evidence: The task was marked complete before all necessary information had been exchanged.
